_comment: Deliberate exceptions to check-no-secret-echo. An entry here is a decision, not an oversight — state why the secret is allowed to reach the output stream.

exemptions.reason: Local-dev seeder whose whole purpose is to hand you a throwaway test JWT to paste into your shell ('export ACP_TOKEN=...'). The token is minted against a local stack, is short-lived, and printing it IS the feature. Never point this script at a shared or production backend.
